scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-templates && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-template-presets && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/learning-path-demo-t0.test.mjs tests/learning-path-demo-t1.test.mjs tests/learning-path-demo-t2.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-templates && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-template-presets && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && tsc --noEmit
